cardSubtitle: Soft Neoprene Cosmetic Pouch with Custom Logo Options
logo: Printing (silk screen/heat transfer/hot stamping), embroidery, woven label, PU leather patch, silicone rubber patch, etal plate
application: Suitable for travel, home organization, cosmetic storage, toiletries storage, beauty product packaging, promotional gifts, and customized brand merchandise.
title: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Waterproof Makeup Pouch with Zipper
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag | Waterproof Makeup Bag Manufacturer
description:
Premium Neoprene Material
Made with high-quality neoprene fabric, offering softness, flexibility, durability, and a comfortable hand feel.​
Water-Resistant & Easy to Maintain
The protective neoprene surface helps prevent moisture penetration and can be easily cleaned for long-term use.​
Practical Storage Solution
Perfect for organizing cosmetics, makeup tools, skincare products, toiletries, and daily essentials.​
Lightweight & Travel-Friendly Design
The portable design makes it suitable for travel, business trips, vacations, and everyday carrying.​
Custom Design Available
Support custom colors, dimensions, logo printing, labels, packaging, and other OEM/ODM requirements.
seoDescription: Discover high-quality neoprene cosmetic bags with waterproof, lightweight and durable designs. We provide custom makeup pouches, OEM/ODM services and wholesale solutions for global beauty brands and distributors.
